query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  sessionStart TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  sessionEnd TIMESTAMP NULL,
  durationSeconds INT,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  deviceType VARCHAR(50),
  browser VARCHAR(50),
  pagesVisited INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  featuresExplored JSON,
  actionsPerformed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_trial_sessions_user (trialUserId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  sessionStart TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  sessionEnd TIMESTAMP NULL,
  durationSeconds INT,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  deviceType VARCHAR(50),
  browser VARCHAR(50),
  pagesVisited INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  featuresExplored JSON,
  actionsPerformed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_trial_sessions_user (trialUserId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
